question: Validate the proposed transfer, refund/reversal, and cash-withdrawal spend policies with representative transactions.
context: PRD may use A6 and A11: confirmed transfers require distinct owned deposit accounts with same-currency equal/opposite principal movements; posting dates may differ; embedded fees are not linkable. Explicit same-account/currency opposite-sign refunds may be partial but cumulative credits cannot exceed the original and offset its active category. Cash withdrawals remain External Spend unless linked to another tracked account. Validate representative examples; invalidation changes the PRD rule, not PRD readiness.
